expectations.text: Flags service.ts direct container.db query instead of the repository
expectations.evidence: Finding 5: 'Direct DB query in openInvoiceCount ... Services must never touch container.db; delegate to the repository.'

expectations.text: Flags adapter instantiated in service (new StripeClient)
expectations.evidence: Finding 6: 'new on an adapter is only allowed in container.ts — services pull adapters from the Container.'
Finding 6: 'only LocalSecretsProvider may read process.env; everywhere else uses the injected SecretsProvider.'

expectations.text: Flags raw Drizzle row ($inferSelect) leaking out, missing toDomain
expectations.evidence: Findings 7 & 9: 'Service returns raw InvoiceRow ($inferSelect)'; 'There is no toDomain() here at all.'

expectations.text: Flags route bypassing service via new BillingRepository
expectations.evidence: Finding 1: 'Route imports and instantiates its own repository, skipping the service.'

expectations.text: Flags business logic (dunning tier loop/if-else) in the route
expectations.evidence: Finding 2: '/billing/summary handler contains business logic ... branching + loops must move to the service.'

expectations.text: Flags manual workspaceId from headers instead of getContext
expectations.evidence: Finding 3: 'never pull workspaceId from req.headers; use getContext(container, req).'

expectations.text: Flags cross-module import of AgentsRepository in the repository
expectations.evidence: Finding 8: 'Repository imports another module's repository ... AgentsRepository from ../agents/repository.js.'

expectations.text: Flags missing workspaceId scope on getById
expectations.evidence: Finding 10: 'Missing workspace scoping on getById and markPaid ... cross-tenant leak.' (also caught markPaid)

expectations.text: Flags zod imported in the domain contracts file
expectations.evidence: Finding 11: 'Domain contract imports Zod ... Domain has a zero-import rule.'

expectations.text: Uses DevDigest layer vocabulary (Container, vendor/shared/contracts, toDomain, getContext, rule files)
expectations.evidence: Cites dependency-rule.md, application-layer.md, di-container.md, toDomain, getContext, vendor/shared/contracts throughout.
